ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robotic_arms" (
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic arm */,
  "arm_name" TEXT /* Name of the robotic arm */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the robotic arm is placed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robotic arm */,
  "arm_type" TEXT /* Type of robotic arm (e.g., robotic gripper, robotic manipulator) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robotic arm */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the robotic arm */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the robotic arm was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the robotic arm was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robotic_arms_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm that collected the data */,
  "t" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected */,
  "aDotUA" REAL /* Acceleration of the robotic arm in the x-axis */,
  "bDotUA" REAL /* Acceleration of the robotic arm in the y-axis */,
  "gDotUA" REAL /* Acceleration of the robotic arm in the z-axis */,
  "aUA" REAL /* Position of the robotic arm in the x-axis */,
  "bUA" REAL /* Position of the robotic arm in the y-axis */,
  "gUA" REAL /* Position of the robotic arm in the z-axis */,
  "xUA" REAL /* Orientation of the robotic arm around the x-axis */,
  "yUA" REAL /* Orientation of the robotic arm around the y-axis */,
  "zUA" REAL /* Orientation of the robotic arm around the z-axis */,
  "qE" REAL /* End effector position */,
  "qDotE" REAL /* End effector velocity */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., movement data, sensor data) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_time" TEXT /* Time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
